reflections.context: Supervisor pointed me at 0622adb1 (autonomous execution loop) as highest-value uncommitted work. Checked-before-building per the guide.
reflections.outcome: The loop's core is already implemented (watchdog state machine). Reconciled stale statuses instead of rebuilding: rename child e2dd4a42 verified done (0 'animator' refs remain), merged my duplicate effector aim 1be76eaf into the established 6119682f, set 0622adb1 to partially with a precise done-vs-remaining breakdown.
reflections.effectiveness: High-value grounding: prevented rebuilding an existing system and removed a duplicate I had introduced, keeping the graph a trustworthy compass.
reflections.lesson: A large 'Implement X' aim surfacing as highest-value is often already built — the win is reconciling its true status and pruning duplicates, not coding. Verify against the actual code (grep) before treating an aim as unbuilt.

status.comment: Verified complete: zero 'animator' references remain in packages/wrapped-agents (*.ts/*.vue). The system is named supervisor throughout (supervisor-prompts.ts, supervisor-state.ts, WORKER_SUPERVISOR_PREFIX, getSupervisorStateInfo) and the enable toggle is 'automate'.
